steps.title: Identify the chronological sequence
steps.content: The passage spans from 1585 to 1591 to 1596, marking Shakespeare's career milestones. The signal is forward movement in time.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content: ”Later,” marks progression forward to the next point in time. The other three fail to mark temporal progression: “In other words” reformulates, “Conversely” introduces contrast, and “Thus” signals causality. That matches choice D — D is correct.
